pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh and verifier.py - these are the target canonical tag names used throughout the task
Verified from setup_task.sh lines 77-91 and export_result.sh lines 30-31 - these are the variant tags created to test consolidation
Verified by code analysis of setup_task.sh: Canonical 'Deep Learning' (2 items) + 'deep-learning' variant (2 items) + 'deep learning' variant (2 items) = 6 total items after merge
Verified by code analysis of setup_task.sh: Canonical 'NLP' (1 item) + 'nlp' variant (3 items) = 4 total items after merge

privileged_info_summary: The task consolidates variant tags in a Zotero library. Initial state: 'Deep Learning' tag has 2 papers (LeCun/Bengio/Hinton 2015 Deep Learning, Krizhevsky et al. 2012 AlexNet); 'deep-learning' variant has 2 papers (Vaswani et al. 2017 Attention, Devlin et al. 2019 BERT); 'deep learning' lowercase variant has 2 papers (He et al. 2016 ResNet, Goodfellow et al. 2014 GANs). 'NLP' tag has 1 paper (Shannon 1948 Mathematical Theory of Communication); 'nlp' variant has 3 papers (Brown et al. 2020 GPT-3, Turing 1950 Computing Machinery, McCarthy 1960 Recursive Functions). Expected final state after successful consolidation: 'Deep Learning' contains 6 items, 'NLP' contains 4 items, and all variant tags are deleted.
